name: @alexmchan/watch-github-job
description: Watch a GitHub Actions run until it completes

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --target=node --outfile dist/watch-github-job.js && chmod +x dist/watch-github-job.js
scripts.release: npm version patch && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm publish --access public
